items.name: Living Soil Salad Mix
items.description: Grown in soil with full prokaryotic association. Nutrient density you can taste.

items.name: Spicy Radishes (Bunch)
items.description: Pulled from the ground this morning. Soil banditry proof.

items.name: Pasture-Raised Duck Eggs
items.description: The result of carbon capping and happy ducks.

items.name: Fermented Kimchi (16oz)
items.description: A seven-vegetable biodiversity bomb. 100% fermentation-derived sourness. No vinegar. Gives your gut the 'pass-through' update it needs.

items.name: Escabeche
items.description: Jalapenos, onions, carrots. Crunchy, spicy, and alive. The bacteria ring on the bottom proves it's working.
